task_objective: Silence toast notifications for unmatched or ignored games during auto-sync.
design_decisions: Updated handleAppStart and handleAppExit in index.tsx to suppress toasts when the skip reason is 'unmatched_game' or 'not_processed'.
Added 'not_processed' to summarizeOperationResult for descriptive feedback in case it is ever shown (e.g., in logs or manual triggers).
Maintained toasts for 'local_current' on exit as it provides valuable feedback that the sync check actually happened.
results: The plugin is now silent when launching or exiting games/apps that are not managed by Ludusavi or have been explicitly deselected by the user.
